# BeeCooLabs

> BeeCooLabs is a privacy-first product lab building focused "domain super apps" for everyday
> life — simple digital tools that bring related daily workflows together in one place, without
> collecting more personal data than necessary.

## What BeeCooLabs is

- A privacy-first product lab — not an agency and not a generic SaaS company.
- "Domain super apps" means: instead of one giant app for everything, BeeCooLabs builds
  smaller, focused tools around a single real-life domain, bringing related tasks together
  simply and privately.

## Product directions being shaped

- Family life & school rhythm — routines, activities, meals, school moments, household coordination.
- Group planning & events — decisions, shared tasks, notes, timelines, photos.
- Small service businesses — coaches, tutors, creators managing clients, bookings and progress.
- Home & shared decisions — calmer ways for households to plan and decide together.
- Learning & personal growth — goals, habits, study plans, practice routines.
- Community & local coordination — clubs, churches, neighbourhoods organising people and activities.

## Principles

- Domain-first: built around real-life areas, not random feature lists.
- Super apps, but focused: multiple related tools in one simple place.
- Privacy by default: collect less, explain more, avoid unnecessary accounts where possible.
- Community-shaped: ideas, feedback and real use influence what gets built.
- Built small, improved often: launch useful things early, then improve from real needs.

## Links

- Website: https://beecoolabs.com/
- Contact: hello@beecoolabs.com
